reasoning.typography: Arial fallback system font — no typographic identity whatsoever, just a loading spinner state
reasoning.hierarchy: Literally nothing to hierarchize — just a centered spinner icon with no content, headlines, or information architecture
reasoning.distinctiveness: A generic loading spinner on a gray background could be any company/product — zero personality or differentiation
reasoning.color: Monochromatic gray (#343541 bg, #8e8ea0 spinner) is restrained but only because there's no actual content to colorize
reasoning.density: Empty screen with absolute center alignment — no content density decisions made because no content exists
reasoning.voice: No IA, no story, no structure — this is a loading state masquerading as a website, revealing nothing about OpenAI's brand or offering

winning_patterns: Clean geometric spinner animation with rotation effect
anti_patterns: Entire viewport is just a loading spinner — no progressive content delivery
Meta refresh every 360 seconds suggests broken architecture rather than intentional design
Zero textual content or brand messaging during load state
No skeleton UI or meaningful placeholder content
Generic Arial fallback instead of branded typography
Completely fails to communicate what OpenAI is or does
